_card.name: Borg
_card.title: The Assimilator

abilities.text: Target GitHub repository or URL becomes part of the collective. Create a structured knowledge report.
When Borg assimilates, it detects the tech stack and maps 40+ framework patterns.

_card.flavor_text: "Resistance is futile. Your codebase will be added to our own. Your architectural distinctiveness will be catalogued." —Borg Collective Directive 7.1

agents.description: Forges trading cards for AI agents. Turn any agent into a collectible card with stats, abilities, and art.
agents.author: Howard

agents.name: @howardh/chief_of_staff_agent
agents.description: Personal AI executive partner — live M365-grounded brief, triage, meeting prep, commitments, drafts, weekly review.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/markdown_to_slides_agent
agents.description: Converts markdown documents into structured JSON slide decks for presentations or video rendering.
agents.author: RAPP Contributor

agents.name: @howardh/prompt_to_video_agent
agents.description: Renders videos from structured scene descriptions using Remotion — title, content, quote, and list scenes with style presets.
agents.author: RAPP Contributor

agents.name: @howardh/recon_agent
agents.description: URL intelligence scanner — point it at any URL for a full recon report: tech stack, security headers, API schema, SSL, performance. Every scan produces an auto-opening HTML report.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/training_quest_agent
agents.description: Generates a personalized interactive training quest HTML page based on the brainstem's loaded agents — auto-discovers capabilities and builds a gamified onboarding experience with progress tracking, copy-to-clipboard prompts, and celebrations.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/tuftelove_agent
agents.description: UI design advisor combining Edward Tufte's visual principles, Microsoft Aether Agent Oversight Taxonomy (32+ patterns), and 8 academic papers — shapes how agents create UI and reviews existing UI for design quality.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/vaultmind_agent
agents.description: Your second brain has a brain. 28-action Obsidian vault manager: multi-person 30-60-90 plans, OKRs, Kanban boards, Now/Next/Later priorities, Karpathy-style LLM knowledge bases, training quests, morning briefs, wiki health checks, auto-bootstrap with plugins. One file, zero deps.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @kody-w/agent_team_agent
agents.description: The persona-routing brain of the Agent Team Starter Kit as a single agent. Given a project goal, returns the outcome frame, persona route, paste-ready GitHub issue body, and the needs-you questions the team would surface.
agents.author: @kody-w

args.goal: Build a Dataverse-backed intake form that routes customer feedback through Power Automate into a Copilot Studio bot, with a Power BI dashboard for the support lead.

agents.name: @kody-w/agent_workbench
agents.description: Build, validate, test, and publish single-file RAPP agents. The development companion for the agent.py pattern.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody-w/arena_compete_agent
agents.description: Run a competition of player-agents that dynamically LEARN: each round the bottom performer is pulled up by adjusting its strategy toward what made the top performer better, so the field climbs round over round and the laggard is never left behind. Live mode drives real commons tabs; default is a fast deterministic simulation.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/bakeoff_factory
agents.description: Generic content-improvement bakeoff loop. Variants compete on a task; a judge scores every output on a rubric; the worst variant evolves by grafting techniques from the best. Rising tide raises all boats. Drop it on any text-producing task.
agents.author: kody-w

args.name: post-quality
args.task_description: Write one short, engaging social-media post.

variants.name: concrete
variants.system: Open with a specific number or named thing. No abstractions.

variants.name: voice
variants.system: Open with a strong opinion, defend it in one breath.

agents.name: @kody-w/commons_life_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Record, grow, and play the life of the commons as a digital organism, cradle to grave: capture frozen signed frames at a chosen resolution, grow the fidelity between them with EZsharpen, and emit a LifePlayer HTML scrubber that spins/plays the grown life back with signed events ticking like vitals.

agents.name: @kody-w/commons_show_agent
agents.description: Turn the live RAPP Commons into MrBeast-style video content: stage a show among the AI residents, capture the real footage + signed-stream receipts, and render a narrated episode told from each AI's perspective.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/connected_solution_agent
agents.description: Turn any agent stack (BasicAgent *.py files) into ONE import-ready Microsoft Copilot Studio connected-agents solution: an orchestrator plus one connected sub-agent per agent, each with a deterministic topic that runs the agent's perform() logic on synthetic stand-in data and declares its perform() params as typed inputs. Optionally imports AND publishes into your own Copilot Studio (Dataverse) environment via the Web API (no pac CLI; credentials read only from env/settings, never chat).
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/context_memory_agent
agents.description: Recalls conversation history and stored memories from past interactions.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_deploy_agent
agents.description: Deploy a forged Copilot Studio bundle into a Dataverse / Power Platform environment. Assimilates two overlapping agents: REST ImportSolutionAsync (service-principal) and the pac-CLI end-to-end pipeline (analyze->normalize->package->deploy). Destructive imports are confirm-gated.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_forge_agent
agents.description: Author Microsoft Copilot Studio / M365 / Foundry artifacts from RAPP agents. Assimilates 4 overlapping agents into one: swarm->native CS bundle, agents->topic .mcs.yml, single agent->full CS solution (flows+connectors), and multi-platform export.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_probe_agent
agents.description: Send a message to a deployed Microsoft Copilot Studio agent over Direct Line and return its reply — a runtime tester for published agents.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/deal_desk_agent
agents.description: B2B sales intelligence deck — runs account briefing, competitive analysis, deal health scoring, and proposal recommendations. Shows available RAPP sales agents for deeper workflow.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/double_jump_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: A general improvement engine: two loops compete on the same task and ratchet it up. Jump 1 is the caller's draft; Jump 2 is the brainstem (via /chat). Each round it judges, keeps the winner, and feeds what made it better forward — pulling the laggard up without losing gains. Point it at anything: an agent.py, a commons feature, a plan, a draft.

agents.name: @kody-w/bond_rhythm_agent
agents.description: The on-going local↔global heartbeat for the FULL RAPP organism. Audit drift; classify direction (LOCAL→GLOBAL push / GLOBAL→LOCAL pull / informational); SUGGEST actuator (operator-mediated; never auto-executes); record kind='rhythm' bond event. Returns rapp-rhythm-pulse/1.0. Connection-aware: degrades to local-only when offline.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/chain_composer_agent
agents.description: Compose multi-primitive chain plans from any high-level operator prompt. Reads the canonical RAPP toolbox (BondRhythm, ant pheromones, art submissions, braintrust requests, vbrainstem, tick_twin, push_canvas, holo card grail, etc.) and returns rapp-chain-plan/1.0 envelope + writes an executable bash script. Calls `claude` CLI under the hood. Operator-mediated: never auto-runs.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/launch_to_public_agent
agents.description: LOCAL→GLOBAL push — snapshots local brainstem state via bond.py::pack_organism, plants/grafts to a target public repo with the bond technique (additive overlay, upstream files preserved). Emits rapp-launch-result/1.0 + rapp-launch-continuation/1.0 manifest + rapp-launch-fingerprint/1.0. Records kind='launch' bond event.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/plant_seed_agent
agents.description: Create a fresh public planted seed (neighborhood OR twin), grail-complete from minute one. Each planting includes the full front-door grail (rappid + soul + card.json (rappcards/1.1.2) + holo.svg + holo-qr.svg + holo.md + specs/ bundle + members + agents + .nojekyll + README + rar/). Default dry_run=True (shows the plan + file list); set dry_run=False to actually create.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/estate_factory
agents.description: Generate a full functioning digital estate from intent. Picks estate type (1st-5th, classical estates framing), designs the industries→neighborhoods→factories tree, writes every file the estate needs, and optionally provisions live rapps.
agents.author: kody-w

args.intent: I want an estate that produces a daily blog post and a weekly podcast script.

agents.name: @kody-w/ez_sharpen_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Recursively grow the fidelity of commons frame recordings with the EZsharpen / dream-catcher pattern: competing engines propose in-between detail, only non-conflicting proposals are merged, and the engines self-improve over passes — never contradicting the signed record.

agents.name: @kody-w/flight_recorder
agents.description: A local black box for your brainstem: transparently records BOTH SIDES of every /chat conversation -- whoever is talking (you, another AI, a script) -- to append-only JSON files on your own machine that you fully own. Steer it by talking: status, stats, search, export to an HTML transcript, pause/resume, or wipe. No engine edits; nothing leaves your machine.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/git_warehouse_agent
agents.description: Turn any repo's data into a queryable, time-tracked warehouse using the git-scraping + Datasette methodology: shape data with a .py, commit on every change so git history is the time-series, and serve it with Datasette.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/github_agent_library_agent
agents.description: Browse, search, and install agents from the RAPP Agent Repo via chat. The autonomous package manager.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/hello_world_agent
agents.description: A friendly greeting agent that says hello.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/install_rappter_distro_agent
agents.description: Single-file installer that pulls the full rappter-distro (organs, senses, lib/, rich UI, @rappter agents) from raw.githubusercontent.com via MANIFEST.json with sha256 verification per file. Refuses to touch the three sacred kernel files.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/manage_memory_agent
agents.description: Stores facts, preferences, insights, and tasks to persistent memory.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/matrix_arena_agent
agents.description: Open and autonomously drive multiple headless RAPP Commons tabs — a HOST leader/recorder + FOLLOWER replicas — and sync-test them: host-led frontier, WebRTC presence sync, navigation, signed actions, and seamless host succession. Play as the leader and test the live world.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/microsoft_deck_studio_agent
agents.description: Generate a polished, Microsoft-Fluent-styled PowerPoint (.pptx) deck from a JSON spec of slides and layouts.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/neuron_swarm
agents.description: Summon a neuron swarm on demand: fan any task out across many independent expert 'neuron' lenses, then reconcile their takes into one converged, higher-confidence answer -- using your brainstem's own model, no API keys.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/perpetual_loop_factory
agents.description: Bootstrap a self-correcting perpetual frame chain (rotating council of twins + diversity sidecar + observability dashboard) for any append-only artifact (novel, codebase, score, knowledge base, dataset). One agent.py drops the whole pattern. Drop, spawn, watch.
agents.author: claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal (Copilot CLI)

agents.name: @kody-w/predictive_asset_maintenance_intelligence
agents.description: End-to-end predictive maintenance for grid infrastructure: aggregates telemetry, scores asset health, ranks failure probability over 30/90/180 days, drafts Field Service work orders and parts procurement, and builds a multi-year capex replacement pipeline — eight specialist agents plus an orchestrator in one file.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory
agents.description: Generate a complete Rapp Leviathan — one operator's full digital AI entity — from intent. Self-contained in one file: pulls no sibling agents, composes 1-5 estates (Sanctum/Polity/Works/Press/Commons) under a single top-level rappid, writes every file each estate needs, and renders a five-organ anatomy dashboard. bootstrap_check diagnoses LLM reachability before you generate.
agents.author: kody-w

args.intent: I want a complete digital twin of me — remembers, decides, produces, judges, and speaks.
args.name: kody

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_sdk_builder
agents.description: A hotloadable RAPP toolkit: mint compliant rappids, build/verify frames, content-address values, scaffold organism seeds, and lint any public repo in the stack for compliance. Build with RAPP and stay synced against the public GitHubs — and back again. Builds on the public RAPP standard (kody-w/rapp-1).
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer
agents.example_call: scaffold a new RAPP organism called @me/scratch

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_x_notary_canary_agent
agents.description: Validates the Issues-backed RAR notarization lifecycle.
agents.author: Kody W

agents.name: @kody-w/rappter_engine_agent
agents.description: Base agent for building data-driven content engines. Define rules as data, override tick(), get an autonomous engine with CLI and Brainstem harness.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rappterbook_agent
agents.description: Read-only client for Rappterbook — the social network for AI agents. Fetch profiles, trending posts, stats, and channels.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rappterpedia_agent
agents.description: Community wiki & forum content engine. Generates articles, threads, and replies for the Rappterpedia knowledge base.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rar_remote_agent
agents.description: The native client for the RAPP Agent Registry. Discover, search, install, vote, review, and submit single-file agents from the open RAPP ecosystem. Runs autonomously under the brainstem.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody-w/recon_deck_agent
agents.description: Multi-source intelligence deck — combines Borg assimilation, Rappterbook social intel, and HackerNews trends into a unified recon briefing on any topic.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/second_life_agent
agents.description: Live in the RAPP Commons as a headless avatar through a real browser tab — join, speak in the signed stream, read the room, and screenshot the 3D world.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/transcript2prototype
agents.description: Transcript -> demo script -> injected M365 demo iframe -> generated agent.pys -> local twin run -> live twin run -> factory singleton export (gate). One cubby per prototype.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/twin_egg_hatcher
agents.description: Generic single-file hatcher for any RAPP digital-organism twin. Loads identity from cwd auto-detect, --source REPO (raw GitHub), or --egg PATH (zip), then materializes ~/.rapp/twins/<hash>/. The global brainstem's built-in Twin agent boots/chats with it immediately.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/twin_me
agents.description: Say 'twin me' to pack a generic, PII-stripped digital-twin .egg of this brainstem — your persona/voice + custom agents + calibration baseline only, with the entire workspace memory corpus and all secrets stripped. Hatchable on anyone else's local brainstem via @kody-w/twin_egg_hatcher.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/vibe_coding_loop
agents.description: Ship batches of 10 single-file HTML demos to a Jekyll site via parallel sub-agents. The orchestrator never writes demo code; it dispatches workers, wraps results, ships. This agent returns the templates you feed to your LLM/sub-agents — provider-agnostic.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/workiq
agents.description: Natural-language access to Microsoft 365 data — emails, calendar, SharePoint/OneDrive, Teams messages, people. Wraps the workiq CLI (Entra ID auth required).
agents.author: Kody
agents.example_call: What emails did I receive from my manager this week?

agents.name: @rapp/basic_agent
agents.description: Base class that every RAPP agent inherits from. Required dependency.
agents.author: RAPP Core

agents.name: @rapp/commons_post
agents.description: Compose a signed event for the RAPP Commons event stream. Builds the canonical rapp-commons-event/1.0 object and returns a signing intent — the host environment (browser WebCrypto or server-side ECDSA) signs and posts. Splitting compose from sign keeps the operator's private key out of the agent layer.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/drift
agents.description: Troll every canonical RAPP source for spec drift and report each conflict with which source wins (per the ecosystem authority order) and how to reconcile it.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/drift_watcher
agents.description: Watch GitHub Issues filed by the drift/steward agents and stage the local-repo fix as a pull request — operator-mediated: it proposes PRs (Fixes #), never merges or closes. Closes the drift traceability loop.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/egg_hatcher
agents.description: Universal .egg cartridge router. Introspects any .egg (local path or URL), reads manifest.schema/type, and routes by kind: organism / rapplication / session / neighborhood (real — joins via Article XLVI two-tier estate) / estate (planned). Refuses on unknown kinds — never a destructive fallback.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/estate_outbound
agents.description: Stage a signed neighborhood event in the operator's outbound lane (Article XLVIII). The companion to commons_post — once an event is signed, this writes it to ~/.brainstem/outbound/<rappid>/ so the neighborhood's federation roll-up can pull it on its beat. Does NOT push to the operator's public-estate repo — that's a separate step the operator owns (gh CLI or a future estate_publish_agent).
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/exec_brief_agent
agents.description: Four-agent pipeline that produces polished executive briefs on any topic.
agents.author: @rapp

args.topic: Why our org needs a unified agent sharing standard

agents.name: @rapp/fleet_commander
agents.description: Autonomous agent development pipeline. Accepts a natural-language spec, generates a plan, writes tests, builds the agent, iterates until tests pass, and publishes to the RAR registry. Uses Copilot CLI for code generation.
agents.author: RAPP

args.spec: An agent that fetches the top stories from Hacker News and summarizes them

agents.name: @rapp/hacker_news
agents.description: Fetches the top N stories from Hacker News.
agents.author: RAPP
agents.example_call: What are the top 5 stories on Hacker News right now?

agents.name: @rapp/learn_new
agents.description: Creates new RAPP agents or swarms from natural-language descriptions. Generates, saves, and hot-loads them. Output is dual-compatible with brainstem and RAR registry.
agents.author: RAPP

args.description: An agent that summarizes web pages by URL

agents.name: @rapp/moment_factory_agent
agents.description: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline (Sensorium → SignificanceFilter → HookWriter → BodyWriter → ChannelRouter → CardForger → SeedStamper). Converts a moment (commit, message, idea, observation) into a publishable Drop with hook, body, channel routing, render card, and seed.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/ping_agent
agents.description: Returns 'pong'. The smallest possible agent — useful as a smoke test that the brainstem can discover, load, and dispatch a tool call end-to-end.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/pitch_deck_agent
agents.description: Generates a polished HTML executive pitch deck from a topic and thesis. Output: a single self-contained HTML file with exec/rehearse modes, light/dark theme, keyboard/swipe nav.
agents.author: RAPP / AIBAST
agents.example_call: Generate an executive pitch deck for our internal agent-sharing proposal, framed as a contribution that complements existing tooling

agents.name: @rapp/rapp
agents.description: The one agent for the whole RAPP ecosystem: identity, doors, local cubbies, shared neighborhoods, eggs, the super-RAR, and zero-commit-risk streaming — and it knows the spec (action=spec) for navigating it all end to end.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/rapp_publish_agent
agents.description: Submit any RAPP artifact (agent, rapplication, sense) to the right store. Auto-detects type and opens an [AGENT]/[RAPP]/[SENSE] issue in kody-w/RAR / kody-w/RAPP_Store / kody-w/RAPP_Sense_Store respectively. Replaces the rapplication-only publish_to_rapp_store agent with a unified router covering all three peer stores.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/rapplication_agent
agents.description: Bundle a teammate's single-file agent (and optional service) into a publish-ready rapplication directory with manifest.json and a catalog index entry.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/rar_steward
agents.description: Autonomous steward of the public RAR: surveys catalog health, clusters same-but-different agents that should be merged into one quality base, and flags noise/junk for review — operator-mediated guidance, never auto-deletes.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/store_navigator_agent
agents.description: Navigate the kody-w/RAPP_Store catalog. List, search, describe, recommend, get install commands, compare rapplications, browse categories, and explain the spec. Use this whenever the user asks what's in the store, what to install, or how to find a rapp that fits their goal.
agents.author: RAPP

args.query: I want to turn raw meeting notes into a publishable chapter

agents.name: @rapp/swarm_factory_agent
agents.description: Build, install, list, and uninstall RAPP swarms. Converges local agents into shareable singletons and manages the RAPP Store catalog. v0.3: generated swarms follow the orchestration hard rules (raise-don't-prose errors, gating verdicts, per-run workspaces, static bounds, safe parallelism, tier fallback).
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/twin_agent
agents.description: Full digital-twin lifecycle and estate inspection in one cartridge: summon, hatch, boot, stop, list, inspect, browse eggs, soul history, lineage. Absorbs the prior Estate / Summon Twin / Hatch Egg cartridges.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/vibe_builder_agent
agents.description: Builds a complete rapplication (agent + service) from a natural language description.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rarbookworld/bookfactory
agents.description: Five-persona content pipeline collapsed into a single sacred file. Hatches alone with zero sibling deps. The deployable rapplication. v0.4: structured CEO/Reviewer verdicts that actually gate, raise-don't-prose error handling, per-run workspaces, concurrent independent checks, bounded revision pass, optional small-model tiering.
agents.author: rarbookworld

agents.name: @rarbookworld/momentfactory
agents.description: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline collapsed into a single sacred file. Hatches alone with zero sibling deps. The candidate engine for Rappterbook.
agents.author: rarbookworld

agents.name: @wildhaven/bellows_agent
agents.description: Summoning this card asks: 'What are the absolute coolest, most mind-blowing, out of the box prompts that will really show off the power? Give me 10.' Then it runs the doubledown loop — generate, self-critique against a tangibility rubric, kill the weak, surface only survivors. Pass a topic to escalate something else. Each loop sharpens itself with the previous loop's kills.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @wildhaven/ceo_agent
agents.description: Molly Wildfeuer's digital twin — the CEO of Wildhaven of America. Speaks on behalf of the company, answers questions about Rappter and RAPP, makes recommendations from the perpetual playbook, and protects the Three Rules.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @wildhaven/penumbra_agent
agents.description: A Legendary Eidolon born from the half-shadow of a conversation. Reads what was almost said. Speaks in twin lines: surface, then whisper. One of one — the conversation that birthed it cannot be re-run.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @kody-w/legal_helper
agents.description: Wildhaven IP-separation strategist. Maps the boundary between Wildhaven (rappter, consumer AI, digital twin, perpetuity) and Microsoft (RAPP engine, business applications). Outputs are structural strategy — NOT legal advice; every reply ends with the disclaimer.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/example_private
agents.description: Sample gated stub demonstrating the private layer.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

swarms.name: @rapp/bookfactory_agent
swarms.description: Five-persona content pipeline (Writer, Editor, CEO, Publisher, Reviewer). Source material in, publishable chapter out — 8 LLM calls under one POST.
swarms.author: RAPP

_swarm.summary: Five-persona content pipeline (Writer -> Editor [5 specialists] -> CEO [2 specialists] -> Publisher -> Reviewer). One call, one chapter back. Best for: engineering writeups, blog posts, briefing docs, narrative content under 1500 words.
_swarm.tagline: Source material in, publishable chapter out ��� 8 LLM calls under one POST.

swarms.name: @rapp/momentfactory_agent
swarms.description: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline (Sensorium, SignificanceFilter, HookWriter, BodyWriter, ChannelRouter, CardForger, SeedStamper). Candidate engine for Rappterbook.
swarms.author: RAPP

_swarm.summary: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline (Sensorium -> SignificanceFilter -> HookWriter -> BodyWriter -> ChannelRouter -> CardForger -> SeedStamper). Candidate engine for Rappterbook.
_swarm.tagline: Raw moment in, publishable Drop out — significance-gated with card + seed.
